products.title: Car and truck complete exhaust systems
products.alt: Complete exhaust system kit arranged on a Muffler Men workshop bench
products.imageTitle: Car and truck complete exhaust systems | Oak Flats Muffler Men
products.caption: Complete stainless exhaust systems, mufflers, resonators, pipes, clamps and chrome tips prepared for fitment.
products.issue: Older product card used a mixed legacy image path without the new robot logo treatment.
products.improvement: Replaced with a branded complete-system product bench scene, softer red accents and clearer stainless detail.

products.title: Mufflers and resonators
products.alt: Replacement mufflers and resonators displayed in the Muffler Men workshop
products.imageTitle: Mufflers and resonators | Oak Flats Muffler Men
products.caption: Replacement mufflers, sports mufflers and resonators shown as polished workshop-ready components.
products.issue: Previous image shared a generic performance workshop visual and did not clearly show mufflers and resonators.
products.improvement: Generated a dedicated muffler and resonator product scene with branded logo overlay and sharper metal texture.

products.title: Car and truck exhaust pipes and tips
products.alt: Chrome exhaust tips and pipe hardware on a branded workshop bench
products.imageTitle: Car and truck exhaust pipes and tips | Oak Flats Muffler Men
products.caption: Chrome tips, pipe sections, reducers, clamps and finish hardware arranged for quote selection.
products.issue: Existing pipe and tip image was not part of the new branded visual system.
products.improvement: Generated a premium chrome tips and pipe hardware scene with consistent colour grading and safer mobile framing.

products.title: Extractors and headers
products.alt: Stainless extractors and headers with collector detail in the Muffler Men workshop
products.imageTitle: Extractors and headers | Oak Flats Muffler Men
products.caption: Extractors, headers, collectors, flanges and hardware shown with visible weld and tube detail.
products.issue: Previous extractor image was a generic gallery reference without page-specific branding.
products.improvement: Generated a dedicated extractors and headers product image with clearer welds, collectors and chrome reflections.

products.title: Car and truck performance chips
products.alt: Performance ECU module and diagnostic hardware beside exhaust components
products.imageTitle: Car and truck performance chips | Oak Flats Muffler Men
products.caption: Performance ECU support, diagnostic hardware and exhaust upgrade planning presented as a clean product setup.
products.issue: Previous image came from a supplier-system bench and did not communicate ECU or performance chip support.
products.improvement: Generated a dedicated electronics-and-exhaust product image with abstract non-readable diagnostics and logo branding.

products.title: Car and truck air intake systems

products.imageTitle: Car and truck air intake systems | Oak Flats Muffler Men

products.issue: Previous image came from a supplier-system bench and did not clearly show intake system components.
